详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Specifications Brand Penrite Oil SKU 231379253_SGAMZ-354690586 Multipack or Bundle Individual Model PAS FLUID - (Power Assisted Steering Fluid) 1L What’s in the box PAS FLUID - (Power Assisted Steering Fluid) Highlights PAS Fluid is a premium, semi synthetic oil specially designed for use in Australian, European, US & Korean power steering and suspension systems. It contains a special Anti-Shudder (noise & chatter) ADDITIVE. PAS Fluid fully meets the requirements of Land Rover PAS 14315. Description DESCRIPTION PAS Fluid is a premium, semi synthetic oil specially designed for use in Australian, European, US & Korean power steering and suspension systems. It contains a special Anti-Shudder (noise & chatter) ADDITIVE . PAS Fluid fully meets the requirements of Land Rover PAS 14315. APPLICATION PAS Fluid is recommended for use in the power steering and active cornering enhancement system (ACE) of Land Rover vehicles such as the Discovery and Defender. PAS Fluid also meets or exceeds the requirements for power steering units used by Chrysler and General Motors North America and for ZF power steering units. It may be used in power steering units where automatic transmission fluids are specified and use of a semi-synthetic fluid is desired. PAS Fluid can be used where products such as Pentosin CHF 7.1 or 4548 are recommended and where Dexron VI is recommended in Holden Commodore / Calais / Caprice & HSV VE series vehicles. PAS Fluid can also be used where 7.5W motorcycle fork oil is required. Other applications include the power steering and suspension systems of - Aston Martin BMW Dodge Ferrari Ford Holden/HSV Hyundai Infinity Jaguar Jeep Kia Mazda Mercedes Nissan SAAB Subaru Volvo and many others Penrite also market special power steering and suspension fluids - Power Steering Fluid HPSO Fluid LHM Plus MB 15 LDAS PRODUCT BENEFITS Semi synthetic performance Minimises shudder & noise Extends seal and hose life Good low temperature fluidity Protects against rust and corrosion INDUSTRY & MANUFACTURER'S SPECIFICATIONS AMC 4124 Chrysler MS-5931 Chrysler MS-9462 Esso EZL 998 (Jaguar S) Ford M2C128-C Ford M2C128-D Ford M2C195-A (Power steering only) GM 9985819 GM 9985835 Hyundai PSF-3 Kia PSF-3 Land Rover STC 50717 (ACE) MB 236.3.
